metadata.title: Heavenly Calendar — Cheon Il Guk lunar calendar dataset
metadata.description: Open dataset of the Heavenly Calendar of the Unification Movement: ten canonical Holy Days, weekly Ahn Shil Il (day of rest), and ~50 providential observances of the Family Federation for World Peace and Unification. Lunar dates (month.day) keyed against the Korean lunar calendar with solar-date anchors and a deterministic weekly rest rule.
metadata.calendarSystem: Korean lunar calendar (Heavenly Calendar of Cheon Il Guk)
metadata.epoch: Foundation Day — January 13, 2013 (Gregorian) = 1st year of Cheon Il Guk

schema.anchors: Array of solar-to-lunar reference pairs. Each entry pins a known Gregorian date to its lunar month.day, used by the rendering code to verify the conversion library. Fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD, Gregorian), lunar_md (M.D, lunar month.day).
schema.recurring_lunar_holidays: The ten canonical Holy Days of Cheon Il Guk, observed annually on the same lunar month.day. Fields: name (English), slug (kebab-case ID), lunar_md (M.D), confidence ('high' | 'medium').
schema.recurring_lunar_notes: Secondary providential observances (foundings, declarations, blessings, anniversaries) — not principal Holy Days but tracked annually by lunar date. Fields: lunar_md (M.D), name (English description).
schema.ahn_shil_il_rule: Weekly day of rest in Cheon Il Guk. Computed deterministically as every Nth Gregorian day from a seed date. Fields: description (human-readable), seed_gregorian (YYYY-MM-DD), interval_days (integer, currently 8).
schema.holidays_override_gregorian: Explicit Gregorian-date overrides for specific years where the canonical lunar conversion needs correction. Map of YYYY-MM-DD → holiday name.

ahn_shil_il_rule.description: Ahn Shi Il every 8th day starting from 2025-09-04 (Gregorian)
